attributes.action: Stop the AI datacenter at campus near Scunthorpe, Lincolnshire.
attributes.additional_details: This must be stopped to prevent a negative impact on surrounding wildlife, water quality and air pollution. Not to mention the energy consumption it will inevitably consume at a cost to locals. This project must be cancelled and not go ahead.
attributes.background: Plans for a new datacentre in Lincolnshire have been approved, despite warnings it could be a major new source of emissions. North Lincolnshire council voted unanimously to approve planning permission for the Elsham Tech Park, a proposed AI datacentre campus near Scunthorpe, next to the Elsham Wolds
